meaning: n.召唤者,法院传票送达员
examples: Sure you can handle me, summoner?
Don n't test your luck, summoner!
Only you can hear me Summoner, what masterpiece shall we play today?
Minor gripes and dated features aside, Shin Megami Tensei: Devil Summoner: Soul Hackers is a welcome blast from the past.
Once again, Atlus seeks to wow North American audiences by bringing forth another entry in the Shin Megami Tensei series, Devil Summoner: Soul Hackers.
